label: Footer
summary: The page footer kit: last-updated line, 88×31 badge wall, and a mailto.
era: The page basement of 1999: a "Last updated" line, an 88×31 badge wall, and a mailto envelope that spun.

classes.name: rs-footer__updated
classes.role: the "Last updated:" line; pairs with the last-updated widget

a11y: A real <footer> landmark; badge links need proper accessible names, and the mailto shows the address as its own link text.
